allow: PowerShell(git status --short; Write-Output "=== release tool location ==="; \(Get-Command release -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== branch ==="; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== discord processes ==="; Get-Process -Name discordmain,discordqotd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id,StartTime; Write-Output "=== listening on 8443 ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8443 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess; Write-Output "=== any listener on 84xx/80xx ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -ge 8000 -and $_.LocalPort -le 8999 } | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess)
